## Boundary Checklist

- [ ] This change stays inside the public matrix boundary.
- [ ] Tests or smoke proof were added or updated where behavior changed.
- [ ] This PR does not add source upload, raw diff upload, prompt upload, model response upload, secret handling, hosted verification, public leaderboard behavior, or certification claims.
- [ ] This PR does not claim operating-system sandboxing or automatic rollback.
- [ ] Documentation changes avoid private Runtime governance concepts.
